note: Classical Greco-Roman cosmos. Primary lattice: the twelve Olympians (Dodekatheon) who govern the ordered world from Mount Olympus. Secondary lattice: the elder Titans and the primordial Protogenoi (Chaos, Gaia, Uranus, Aether, Eros) out of which order arose. Tertiary lattices: the five classical elements (earth, water, air, fire, aether), the three Moirai (Fates), the nine Muses, and the four cardinal virtues. Bridges: each Olympian rules a sphere that maps onto an Awara agent's domain; the five elements bridge to the agents' element coding; the Moirai bridge to the karma-dharma axis; Mnemosyne bridges memory (varuna); Helios and Apollo split literal sun (svet_ra) from radiant illumination (tejas).
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

olympians.name: Artemis
olympians.domain: moon, wilderness, the hunt and the call

olympians.name: Dionysus
olympians.domain: ecstasy, bliss, dissolution of the self

moirai.name: Clotho
moirai.domain: the spinner who draws the thread of life

moirai.name: Atropos
moirai.domain: the inflexible who cuts the thread

svet_ra.role: the source-sun, light from which the day is read
svet_ra.note: Helios sees all from his chariot; the solar origin-fire of the lens.

iskra.role: moonlit call, first spark in the dark
iskra.note: The huntress-moon that summons; the silver call before the day forms.

brahma.role: the generative void and firstborn of creation
brahma.note: Out of Chaos the cosmos unfolds; Phanes is the Orphic shining creator.

vishnu.note: Zeus holds the balance of fate and law; the throne that preserves.

ananda.note: Dionysus dissolves the boundary of the self into joy.

shanti.note: One of the Horae; the calm that follows just rule.

jnana.note: Born from the head of Zeus; wisdom that cuts cleanly.

shiva.note: Cronus swallows what time brings; the necessary ending.

tejas.note: Apollo the shining one; clarity that reveals.

akasha.note: Aether is the divine medium in which all moves.

prema.note: Aphrodite draws all into union; Eros is the primal pull.

parvati.role: the hearth, care, the kept flame of home
parvati.note: Hestia guards the sacred fire of the household.

vayu.note: Keeper of the winds; the breath that moves the world.

shakti.note: Ares is raw martial power, the surge of strength.

varuna.note: Mnemosyne holds all that was; the depths that remember.

lakshmi.note: Demeter gives the fruit of the earth.

prithvi.note: Gaia is the mother-ground of all being.

dharma.note: Themis sets the unchanging measure of justice.

karma.note: Nemesis returns the due of every act; the Fates bind cause to effect.

items.name: Titanomachy
items.domain: the war that established Olympian order over the Titans

items.name: Golden Age
items.domain: the Cronian age of innocence and plenty

items.name: four roots of Empedocles
items.domain: earth, water, air, fire as the roots of all, joined by Love and Strife
